holdings.n: State Street Technology Select Sector SPDR ETF

news.t: VanEck Launches TruSector ETFs to Deliver the Exposure Sector Funds Miss

holdings.infoBox: TRUT is an equity ETF with a total of 75 individual holdings. The top holdings are State Street Technology Select Sector SPDR ETF stock at 41.05%, NVIDIA at 15.63%, Apple at 13.68%, Microsoft at 8.83%, and Broadcom at 5.87%.

overview.description: The VanEck Technology TruSector ETF (TRUT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in individual US technology companies as well as broad sector ETF exposure. The selection of holdings utilizes a rules-based quantitative approach and sector weighting based on market capitalization, without regulatory capping limitations. TRUT was launched on Aug 20, 2025 and is issued by VanEck.

holdings.n: State Street Technology Select Sector SPDR ETF

data.title: VanEck Launches TruSector ETFs to Deliver the Exposure Sector Funds Miss
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck launches TruSector ETFs, designed to deliver full market-cap sector exposure and greater precision for allocators.
